goals: Explore available unit conversion categories to understand what conversions are supported
Learn about specific units available in a relevant category (length/distance)
Convert a distance measurement from imperial to metric for travel planning
Convert a speed limit from metric to imperial for driving abroad

user_agent_config.personality: Pragmatic and curious, prefers getting straight to useful information. Not technically inclined but willing to explore tools when needed for practical tasks.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands basic measurements but is unfamiliar with metric-imperial conversions. Does not know tool names or internal APIs. Needs clear, practical results.

end_condition: The user has completed all conversion goals and has the specific measurement values they needed for their travel or work-related task.
